name: Paramedics
overview: A compelling documentary series offering unprecedented insight into the daily lives of emergency service heroes. This series is produced with the help of Ambulance Victoria and features unrivalled access to paramedics, with vision captured from up to 60 cameras rigged in ambulances, helicopters and on motorbikes.

trailers.title: Girl falls off cliff when taking a selfie | Paramedics 2020
